channel.title: Excalidraws on 边缘模型部署架构师之路
channel.description: Recent content in Excalidraws on 边缘模型部署架构师之路

item.description:
==⚠ Switch to EXCALIDRAW VIEW in the MORE OPTIONS menu of this document. ⚠== You can decompress Drawing data with the command palette: ‘Decompress current Excalidraw file’. For more info check in plugin settings under ‘Saving’

Excalidraw Data

Text Elements

Batch个图片 ^XLUIjrLN

两个label ^cqymwnGE

对应label文件中的两条记录 ^ToxFTIvE

cls x y w h ^2o8vXVkb

img_index cls x y w h ^esUDYsff

img_index是这个batch中的图片的索引，带有信息 当前的一个label是来自于当前batch中的哪个图片。 ^sfu0mF2E

[N , 6] ^faaPmfBf

加载label ^D9YZmhKq

0 ^3DPgLg2w

==⚠ Switch to EXCALIDRAW VIEW in the MORE OPTIONS menu of this document. ⚠== You can decompress Drawing data with the command palette: ‘Decompress current Excalidraw file’. For more info check in plugin settings under ‘Saving’

Excalidraw Data

Text Elements

COV ^kyKQ4OF7

COV ^MRI7Rl3x

input ^e5dfvreL

output ^a5sFSx1g

COV ^PkLJl0Ct

COV ^7KjYYsa7

input ^QorFZYdx

output ^6H35m3vu

QuantStub ^z4Bl5MTx

DeQuantStub ^7JqF8KGi

obs ^dLCZoEbR

obs ^aMUhra5a

obs ^40wmxuhP

COV ^dSNAYWOC

COV ^I7KHsVTq
